definitions.text: med alle seilene heist og dermed i høy fart
definitions.translation: with all sails hoisted and thus at high speed

examples.no: barken satte kursen hjemover for fulle seil
examples.en: the barque set course for home under full sail

definitions.text: med stor kraft, fart og energi
definitions.translation: with great power, speed, and energy

examples.en: the economy is going full steam ahead
